headline: AIG CEO Shift Puts Focus On Execution Risk And Existing Growth Targets
summary: American International Group (NYSE:AIG) announced that CEO Peter Zaffino will step down. Eric Andersen, previously a senior leader at insurance broker Aon, has been appointed as the new CEO. The leadership transition marks a key change at the top of one of the largest global insurance and financial services groups. NYSE:AIG sits at the center of global insurance and risk management, with business lines that include commercial, consumer, and specialty coverage. Leadership changes at this...
